About Me

Azure-focused engineer,
data-driven mindset

I'm an Azure Data Engineer with 3+ years of experience designing, developing, and optimizing data solutions across cloud environments. I specialize in building scalable ETL/ELT pipelines, data warehousing solutions, and real-time streaming architectures.

From orchestrating complex workflows with Azure Data Factory to distributed processing with Databricks and PySpark, I focus on delivering reliable data infrastructure that powers business intelligence and decision-making.

Currently based in Toronto, Canada with a Post Graduate diploma in AI & Data Science from Loyalist College and a B.Sc. in Information Technology from G H Patel College of Engineering & Technology, Gujarat Technological University, India.

ETL/ELT Pipelines

Azure Data Factory, Databricks, SSIS — end-to-end orchestration

Azure Cloud

Synapse, ADLS, Event Hubs, Key Vault, Cosmos DB

Data Warehousing

Synapse Analytics, Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric

BI & Reporting

Power BI dashboards driving data-informed decisions

Experience

Professional Journey

Aug 2024 — Till dateCurrent Role

Azure Data Engineer

Connect6 Group Inc., Canada
  • Assisted in designing and implementing data pipelines using Azure Data Factory to automate data integration processes and support ETL workflows
  • Managed and optimized Azure SQL Database instances by performing performance monitoring, query optimization, and troubleshooting to ensure high availability and data integrity
  • Contributed to the setup and maintenance of Azure Synapse Analytics, for the establishment of robust data warehousing solutions and facilitating large-scale data analysis across the organization
  • Supported the development and optimization of ETL processes to ensure seamless data flow, enhancing data quality, and ensuring timely data availability for downstream analytics and reporting
  • Learned about Securing critical data assets by implementing Azure Key Vault for the management of encryption keys and secrets, ensuring compliance with data security standards across multiple Azure services
  • Monitored and maintained data pipeline performance using Azure Monitor, identifying performance bottlenecks and implementing proactive fixes to ensure operational reliability and data processing efficiency
  • Developed data transformations using Azure Databricks and PySpark, enabling advanced data processing on large datasets, and providing insights for strategic decision-making
  • Automated data processing tasks and developed custom scripts for data extraction and transformation using Python and SQL, resulting in improved workflow efficiency and reduction of manual errors
  • Documented the data ingestion processes using Azure Event Hubs to capture, process, and store streaming data for real-time analytics, enhancing decision-making capabilities through up-to-date insights
  • Implemented secure data sharing solutions in Snowflake, enabling cross-departmental data collaboration while maintaining data governance and compliance with organizational security protocols

Projects

End-to-End Data Engineering

5 production-style projects showcasing Medallion Architecture, SCD, and cloud-native pipelines.

Project 1 · Azure Data Factory

Retail Sales Data Pipeline

End-to-end retail pipeline ingesting from REST API & on-prem SQL Server with Medallion Architecture on ADLS Gen2.

  • Medallion Architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) with ADF Data Flows
  • SCD Type 1 & Type 2 on Product and Customer tables
  • Metadata-driven ingestion with Lookup + ForEach
  • Power BI dashboards for sales trends & category revenue
Azure Data FactoryADF Data FlowsADLS Gen2Azure SQL DBKey VaultPower BI
Project 2 · Databricks + Delta Lake

Banking Data Platform

Scalable banking pipeline with ADF orchestration, Databricks PySpark notebooks, Delta Lake star schema, and incremental watermark loading.

  • Service Principal + Key Vault for secure ADLS connectivity
  • Incremental loads via watermark control table
  • Star schema: dim_customer (SCD1), dim_branch, fact_transaction
  • Power BI banking dashboard with KPIs & trend analysis
ADFDatabricksPySparkDelta LakeADLS Gen2Key VaultPower BI
Project 3 · Azure Synapse Analytics

Financial Data Warehouse

Enterprise data warehouse on Synapse with Serverless & Dedicated SQL Pools, Delta Lake, SCD Type 1, and distribution strategies.

  • Dedicated SQL Pool with hash, round-robin & replicate distribution
  • Serverless SQL Pool analytical views for ad-hoc queries
  • SCD Type 1 on Customer via Synapse Dataflows
  • Power BI connected to both Serverless & Dedicated pools
Synapse AnalyticsDedicated SQL PoolServerless SQLDelta LakeADLS Gen2Power BI
Project 4 · Databricks + Unity Catalog

Sales Analytics & KPI Pipeline

Cloud-native pipeline ingesting GitHub sales data into Databricks with Unity Catalog governance, PySpark transformations, and Plotly visualizations.

  • Unity Catalog with Bronze/Silver/Gold schemas & Delta tables
  • Strict data quality: regex validation, deduplication, schema enforcement
  • Gold layer: 6 business KPI tables (yearly, monthly, product, customer, profit, top-5)
  • ADF notebook orchestration & Plotly interactive charts
DatabricksPySparkDelta LakeUnity CatalogADFPlotly
Project 5 · Microsoft Fabric

Banking Pipeline on Fabric

End-to-end solution on Microsoft Fabric with Lakehouse, Dataflow Gen2 cleaning, Fabric Warehouse SCD via T-SQL stored procedures, and Power BI semantic models.

  • Fabric Lakehouse + ADLS Gen2 Shortcuts for zero-copy access
  • Dataflow Gen2 with incremental append strategy
  • SCD Type 1 & 2 via T-SQL stored procedures in Fabric Warehouse
  • Power BI semantic model with scheduled refresh
Microsoft FabricLakehouseWarehouseDataflow Gen2T-SQLADLS Gen2Power BI
